raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "darker box (center of table)",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both arms can reach the left and right sides of the darker box simultaneously; there is enough clearance between the box and the table edges/robot wrists to avoid collision during contact establishment.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box is constrained laterally by both end-effectors and prevented from sliding while the grippers align for a secure lift grasp."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "darker box (center of table)",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The box is laterally stabilized; both claws are aligned at mid-height on opposite sides with enough opening width and contact area; the top is clear so the wrists can rise without hitting anything.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box is securely grasped by both claws from opposite sides and lifted slightly so it is no longer resting on the tabletop."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: Both arms can reach the left and right sides of the darker box simultaneously; there is enough clearance between the box and the table edges/robot wrists to avoid collision during contact establishment.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is constrained laterally by both end-effectors and prevented from sliding while the grippers align for a secure lift grasp.

parsed_json.Precondition: The box is laterally stabilized; both claws are aligned at mid-height on opposite sides with enough opening width and contact area; the top is clear so the wrists can rise without hitting anything.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is securely grasped by both claws from opposite sides and lifted slightly so it is no longer resting on the tabletop.
